task_completion.description: Open the bcWebCam settings or configuration dialog
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bcWebCam application is open and its settings/configuration window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Configure the scanner to send a TAB keystroke after each scan
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the bcWebCam settings, the field for keystrokes sent after a scan (e.g., 'SendKeysPostfix' or similar) is set to TAB or {TAB}.

task_completion.description: Configure duplicate scan prevention to 3 seconds
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the bcWebCam settings, the field for duplicate scan prevention or grace period is set to 3.
In the bcWebCam settings, the checkbox or option for acoustic beep or sound feedback is unchecked or disabled.

integrity.description: The agent used the bcWebCam GUI to change settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the bcWebCam application's graphical interface, not a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not directly edit the configuration file
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editor or terminal is shown modifying the 'bcWebCam.ini' file directly.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine bcWebCam software
integrity.visual_evidence: The bcWebCam application window and its settings dialog are clearly identifiable and match the expected software interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected configuration values are: SendKeysPostfix='{TAB}' (TAB keystroke after scan), BcGracePeriod='3' (duplicate scan prevention for 3 seconds), and Beep='False' (acoustic beep disabled). The agent should configure these via the bcWebCam GUI, not by editing the INI file directly.
